objective: Assessed the plan for a full-screen ratatui config TUI + `grove config` verb against task ACs and the actual T01 config model.
key_changes: Verified T01 assumptions independently: Provider/Mode enums, LEGAL slices, save/validate/load/default signatures, and provider default URLs (11434 Ollama, 8080 llama.cpp) all match config.rs.
validate() rejects empty base_url AND model, so plan test #8 (blank field fails) is valid; save() calls validate() internally with atomic temp+rename.
Architecture honors 'cli formats, core executes': TUI deps confined to cli/Cargo.toml, validation delegated to core; Elm-style model/update/view is headlessly testable per AC #7.
AC coverage 1-4 full; #5 correctly scoped out with dead-code extension point; #6 measured in PR; #7 clippy/tests + allow(dead_code).
Advisory: event loop must restore terminal (disable raw mode + leave alt screen) on ALL exit paths incl. save error, to avoid corrupting user's terminal.
Advisory: App::from_config() should init dirty_url=true for custom loaded URLs so provider switch doesn't clobber existing endpoint; add a test.
Advisory: llama.cpp 8080/v1 default is hard-coded in TUI with no single source of truth in core; consider Provider::default_base_url() helper.
Advisory: confirm no forbidden 'fastcontext' literal is introduced (AC #7).
findings: Plan is feasible, well-scoped, and architecture-aligned; verdict Approved with four non-blocking advisory notes.
